proposed_improvements.title: Add explicit no-op handling for config-only tasks
proposed_improvements.description: When a code review returns no critical issues and no suggestions, the implementor prompt should explicitly allow a no-op Step 4 with only re-validation and documentation artifacts.

proposed_improvements.title: Require deterministic findings schema from review agent
proposed_improvements.description: Ask the review agent to always return machine-readable entries with file, start_line, end_line, severity, and recommendation so findings can be persisted without manual normalization.
